start_here.telegram:
📌 *START HERE — Complete Guide* 📌

*What is Quantum Reality Codes?*
A free web app that converts your structured intentions into 6-digit vibrational codes. These codes serve as numerical anchors for meditation and manifestation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

*Step 1: Create Your Code* (2 minutes)
🔗 https://quantumrealitycodes.com
  • Choose from 12+ intention categories
  • Follow the guided structure (4-6 steps)
  • Each step includes a wisdom quote to inspire you
  • Your intention is encoded: A=1, B=2...Z=26
  • Result: your unique 6-digit Reality Code

*Step 2: Amplify Your Code* (5-15 minutes)
  • Go to the Amplify page on the website
  • Play the 37-73 Hz creation frequency
  • Meditate on your code for 5-15 minutes
  • The frequency aligns your vibration with creative energy

*Step 3: Share & Multiply* (1 minute)
  • Post your code in this group
  • When others meditate on your code, the effect amplifies
  • Join the daily collective code meditation

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

*Bonus features:*
  📓 Journal — track your manifestations (saved on your device)
  📚 Wisdom Library — searchable database of 150+ wisdom quotes
  🔬 Science Pages — research behind the method
  📱 Install as app — works offline on your phone

Questions? Ask in the group — we're here to help! ✨

HOW IT WORKS (3 STEPS)

STEP 1: CREATE YOUR CODE
Visit https://quantumrealitycodes.com and:
- Choose an intention category (Abundance, Healing, Protection, etc.)
- Follow the guided structure (4-6 steps with wisdom quotes)
- Your intention gets encoded using Vibrational Encoding (A=1, B=2...Z=26)
- Generate your unique 6-digit Reality Code

STEP 2: AMPLIFY YOUR CODE
- Go to the Amplify page on the website
- Play the 37-73 Hz creation frequency
- Set a 5-15 minute meditation timer
- Hold your code in your mind while listening

STEP 3: SHARE & MULTIPLY
- Post your code in this group with your intention category

questions.a: A Reality Code is a 6-digit number generated from your written intention using Vibrational Encoding. Each letter has a value (A=1, B=2...Z=26), and the total is compressed into a 6-digit code. This code serves as a numerical anchor — a concentrated symbol of your intention that you can meditate on, share, and carry with you.

questions.q: What is the 37-73 Hz creation frequency?
questions.a: The 37-73 Hz range is called the 'Sound of Creation' — a frequency pattern that resonates with fundamental creative energy. When you meditate on your Reality Code while listening to this frequency, you align your intention with the creative fabric of reality. You can access it on the Amplify page of the website.

Each letter of the English alphabet has a numeric value: A=1, B=2, C=3... Z=26. Digits count at face value (0-9). When you write your intention, every character is summed to create a total vibrational value. This total is then compressed into a 6-digit Reality Code (total mod 1,000,000). The code is unique to your exact words.

Yes. https://quantumrealitycodes.com is 100% free — no accounts, no ads, no premium tiers, no paywalls. All data stays on your device. The creator sustains it through voluntary donations (Buy Me a Coffee). The mission is to make structured intention accessible to everyone.

questions.q: Does sharing my code with others actually do anything?
questions.a: Research on group intention — including the Circle of Eight studies — shows that when multiple minds focus on the same intention, measurable effects occur. When someone meditates on your code, they're adding their conscious energy to your intention. This is why collective code days are our most powerful practice.

The website has a full science section at https://quantumrealitycodes.com/qrcodes-science/ covering quantum physics (observer effect), neuroplasticity (brain rewiring through focus), epigenetics (belief affects biology), NLP anchoring, morphic resonance, and more. Each article references real peer-reviewed studies.

questions.q: How often should I create a new code?
questions.a: There's no fixed rule. Some people create a new code daily as a morning ritual. Others hold onto one code for a week or even a month while focusing on a single intention. The key is consistency — regular meditation on your code strengthens the vibrational pattern.

questions.q: Can I install the app on my phone?
questions.a: Yes! Visit https://quantumrealitycodes.com in your browser, then use 'Add to Home Screen' (or 'Install App'). It works offline as a Progressive Web App (PWA). No app store download needed.

Q: What is the 37-73 Hz creation frequency?

Q: Is this really free? What's the catch?

rules.title: Be Supportive
rules.description: This is a space for amplification, not criticism. Encourage each other's intentions.

rules.title: Share Authentically
rules.description: Post your Reality Codes, intentions, and experiences. Vulnerability strengthens the collective field.

rules.title: Respect Privacy
rules.description: What's shared in this group stays in this group. Never screenshot or share someone's intention without permission.

rules.title: No Spam or Self-Promotion
rules.description: No selling, no MLM, no affiliate links. This group exists for intention, not commerce.

rules.title: No Fear-Based Content
rules.description: We don't do doom, gloom, or fear. If you're struggling, share from a place of seeking growth, not spreading anxiety.

rules.title: Engage With the Practice
rules.description: Participate in daily codes, weekly challenges, and collective sessions. Lurking is fine, but contributing makes the field stronger.

rules.title: Keep It Legal & Kind
rules.description: No hate speech, no harassment, no illegal content. Treat every member as a fellow conscious creator.
